production.playableLoop: Fire a high-speed projectile into a bonded target wall, observe regional breakage, and wait for debris to settle.
production.objective: Cause an impact above the fracture threshold, break only the impacted region, and reach a settled debris state.
production.progression: DestructionState records armed, impact, regional-break, settled, and retry states.
production.failRetry: A missed shot remains armed; KeyR emits a retry request and clears objective state while the scenario runner supplies the fresh physics world.

assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Blender-authored beveled concrete target blocks with warning stripes
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: authored range floor, lighting, and camera
